# Muzamil Khan - Real Estate Agent

> Licensed California real estate agent (DRE #02400805) specializing in buyer representation across the East Bay. Based in El Cerrito, serving El Cerrito, Albany, Berkeley, Kensington, Richmond, Oakland and the surrounding West Contra Costa cities.

## About
Muzamil Khan is a buyer's agent at Rise Group with a construction background and an MBA from UC Davis. He combines hands-on knowledge of how homes are built, data-driven market analysis, and negotiation experience to help buyers win in competitive East Bay markets. He lives in El Cerrito and focuses on West Contra Costa County.

## Specialties
- First-time homebuyers in the East Bay
- Investor clients and fix-and-flip acquisitions
- Comparative market analysis
- Reading inspection reports through a builder's eye
- Off-market deal sourcing

## Service Area
El Cerrito, Albany, Berkeley, Kensington, Richmond, Hercules, Pinole, San Pablo, El Sobrante, Oakland, Alameda County, Contra Costa County, California
